description_long: This is a modern urban bench featuring a combination of light-colored wood and gray stone or concrete materials. The seat and backrest are constructed from flat, rectangular wooden planks with a natural grain pattern, divided into two sections for both the seat and back. The bench is supported by thick, angular legs and armrests made from a stone-like material, giving it a sturdy and robust appearance. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and a geometric form, suitable for public spaces such as parks or sidewalks. The bench has no visible fasteners or decorative elements, emphasizing functionality and durability. The overall aesthetic is contemporary, blending natural and industrial materials for a balanced look.
description: A modern bench with light wood planks for the seat and backrest, supported by thick gray stone or concrete legs and armrests. The design is minimalist and robust, ideal for urban outdoor settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split wooden seat and backrest, with thick stone armrests and legs on either side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden planks and the solid stone armrest and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden backrest panels and the full width of the stone support frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth of the seat and the robust stone support.
attribute_leg_design: thick rectangular stone legs with integrated armrests
